calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DANIEL SHAPERO's Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Per the Proof of Service filed on April 28, 2017 the motion was served on April 12, 2017, i.e. 14 court days before the hearing. The Court also notes that there is no petition to compel arbitration on file. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Fix Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance by the moving party, Petitioner Daniel Shapiro or his counsel.
Respondent Yanic Fridman, the opposing party appears.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DANIEL SHAPERO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Fix Attorneys Fees is GRANTED as follows: $750 included in the memorandum of costs, plus $600 requested in this motion. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Contractual Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney John Bassett, Law Offices of Niven & Smith, LLP 415-981-5451 for Plaintiff Daniel Shapero the moving party.
Defendant Yanic Fridman, 415-305-1881 the opposing party.

After hearing argument in the matter of PETITIONER DANIEL SHAPERO's Petition To Compel Contractual Mediation, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows; GRANTED, no opposition filed. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
